I tried my best :)
After wife comes in ur life,
u should be quiet
Though u c an awesome gal,
u should behave right

When friends come to your home
You Should treat them like guest
Should be silent
Even if you are not right

la la la la la la la .
la la la la la la la la ..common girls
la la la la la la la .
la la la la la la la la

One joined the other to form two
Friend now became girlfriend
Boy joined girl to form bridegroom
Like Titanic ship

Janani, you are my gold lady, you are my soul
please dance without boring

 la la la la la la la .
la la la la la la la la ..common girls
la la la la la la la .
la la la la la la la la

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Common Girls celebrates love and friendship, highlighting the fun and carefree moments shared among friends.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In 3, the song reflects the joyous and celebratory moments of the characters, showcasing their youthful spirit.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Maalavika Manoj and Nadisha Thomas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Common Girls was composed by the renowned Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 25, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Common Girls is a vibrant and upbeat song from the movie 3 that captures the essence of youthful celebration and friendship. The lyrics, penned by Dhanush, convey a light-hearted and fun approach to love and relationships. With the delightful voices of Maalavika Manoj and Nadisha Thomas, the song evokes feelings of joy and camaraderie. Its catchy tune and lively rhythm make it perfect for parties and celebrations, resonating with anyone who cherishes moments with friends.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove to the vibrant beats of Common Girls from the film 3. This lively duet features the enchanting voices of Maalavika Manoj and Nadisha Thomas, perfectly complemented by Anirudh's catchy music. Celebrate love and friendship with this upbeat anthem that captures the essence of youthful joy!
stanzaMeanings: After a wife comes into your life, you should be quiet. Even if you are an amazing girl, you should behave properly. When friends come to your home, you should treat them like guests and remain silent, even if you are not right. la la la la la la la . la la la la la la la la ..common girls la la la la la la la . la la la la la la la la One joined the other to form two. A friend has now become a girlfriend. A boy has joined a girl to become a bridegroom, like the Titanic ship. Janani, you are my precious lady, you are my soul, please dance without being boring. la la la la la la la . la la la la la la la la ..common girls la la la la la la la . la la la la la la la la ...Common girls..
